_comment: RA-6921 (P0) platform-key-fallback register. `pendingMigration` is a ratchet baseline — remove an entry in the same PR that migrates it to resolveWorkspaceAiKey(); never add new entries. `platformInternalExceptions` are routes gated by verifyAdminFromDb (staff-only) or a signature-verified webhook (no end-user session at all) — they are never invoked as part of a client's $99/month workload, so they are intentionally left on the platform key permanently. Re-classify an entry here only if its auth gate changes.

platformInternalExceptions.app/api/margot/chat/route.ts: verifyAdminFromDb-gated — Phill's internal ops assistant, not the customer-facing client-help bubble
platformInternalExceptions.app/api/margot/hermes-proxy/route.ts: verifyAdminFromDb-gated — Phill's internal ops assistant proxy
platformInternalExceptions.app/api/webhooks/github/route.ts: GitHub webhook handler — no end-user session, triggered by repo events only
